intervention: multiple retests under a compatible metric and protocol
comparator: systematic bias versus random error; additive versus proportional error
instrument_protocol: metric-specific repeated-test protocol; inspect heteroscedasticity and scale
uncertainty: formula choice; scale dependence; and compatible-protocol uncertainty must be retained
individual_response: Supports MEASUREMENT_ERROR_EXCEEDING_CHANGE only against a compatible error estimate; no efficacy or safety inference
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; reliability does not transfer automatically across athletes devices tests or protocols; no universal observation count or freshness threshold

intervention: test-retest reliability estimation
comparator: ICC model and variance-component alternatives
instrument_protocol: named ICC model; variance components; SEM formula; MDC confidence level
uncertainty: ICC depends on sample heterogeneity; alternate ICC and SEM formulas produce different values
individual_response: MEASUREMENT_ERROR_EXCEEDING_CHANGE requires calculation provenance and a compatible protocol; naked SEM or MDC values are insufficient
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; no universal observation count time span or freshness rule reported

intervention: performance-test property appraisal
comparator: target performance construct and worthwhile-change requirement
instrument_protocol: test-specific sport-specific and population-specific protocol
uncertainty: error must be small relative to intended worthwhile change and validity must match the construct
individual_response: A reliable but invalid proxy cannot promote beyond OBSERVATION or DESCRIPTIVE_BASELINE; level 3 needs both construct validity and compatible error
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; laboratory sensitivity does not establish competition validity; no universal n or freshness threshold

intervention: statistical interpretation of individual intervention response
comparator: typical error and confidence interval versus justified SWC
instrument_protocol: metric-specific error model plus justified importance threshold
uncertainty: baseline uncertainty and SWC justification remain outcome and decision specific
individual_response: MEASUREMENT_ERROR_EXCEEDING_CHANGE and worthwhile-change status must be shown separately; neither creates a stable responder causal efficacy or safety claim
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; threshold classification does not prove repeatable person-by-intervention response; no universal n or freshness threshold

intervention: exercise training response decomposition
comparator: measurement error; subject-by-training interaction; within-subject efficacy variation; relevant controls
instrument_protocol: controlled and replicated response design
uncertainty: a control group alone may not reveal within-person variation in efficacy; low signal-to-noise remains
individual_response: One pre-post episode cannot establish a responder; PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON needs relevant control and replicated or otherwise design-valid contrasts but no permanent phenotype
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; no universal replication count time span or freshness rule reported

intervention: systematic review of individual-response estimation approaches
comparator: error-aware and importance-aware thresholds versus simple pre-post or group-SD classification
instrument_protocol: study-specific outcome and threshold methods
uncertainty: response rates depend on threshold method and classification uncertainty
individual_response: Simple sign or group-SD bands cannot promote a claim; error and justified importance threshold are both required but do not establish within-athlete causality
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; heterogeneous studies and outcomes prevent universal thresholds and direct youth or middle-distance transfer

event: variance components and replicated individual contrasts
intervention: replicated crossover and variance-component logic
comparator: repeatable individual contrast versus observed between-person spread
instrument_protocol: variance components and replicated crossover design
uncertainty: clinical examples are indirect to sport and observed spread does not prove repeatable personal response
individual_response: PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON requires repeatability of the individual contrast; permanent responder phenotype remains prohibited
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; skeptical methods critique; no universal observation count time span or freshness threshold

intervention: statistical review and re-expression of magnitude-based inference
comparator: MBI procedures versus transparent confidence intervals or fully specified Bayesian models
instrument_protocol: fully specified inferential model and separately justified important effect
uncertainty: MBI inferential procedure is the target; practical-importance thresholds are a separate question
individual_response: SWC may inform an importance boundary but MBI labels cannot promote MEASUREMENT_ERROR_EXCEEDING_CHANGE or PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; reduced-sample claims are not justified; no special small-n exemption or universal n threshold

event: MBI type-I and type-II error simulation
intervention: simulation and mathematical critique of magnitude-based inference
comparator: error-rate behavior across effect sizes sample sizes and smallest important effects
instrument_protocol: method whose operating characteristics match the claim
uncertainty: small-sample inferential uncertainty and false-positive behavior must be disclosed
individual_response: A likely-worthwhile label cannot promote any ladder level without valid uncertainty; small samples receive no causal exemption
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; focused on MBI rather than athlete-monitoring thresholds; no universal n or freshness rule

population: patients clinicians and N-of-1 trial designers
event: randomized periods repeated assessment onset carryover and washout
intervention: balanced or randomized treatment periods with repeated assessment
comparator: alternate treatment periods with onset and carryover handling
instrument_protocol: AHRQ N-of-1 design and analysis guidance
missingness: assessment burden and missingness must be planned
adverse_events: ethics and harms planning required; exact events not applicable to methods guide
uncertainty: serial dependence onset carryover assessment burden and model assumptions remain design-specific
individual_response: PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON requires prospective periods serial analysis and carryover treatment; inseparable training adaptation blocks isolated component attribution
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; clinical-treatment transfer is indirect; training carryover may be intended and cannot be replaced by universal washout duration n or freshness

intervention: single-case design reporting across phases
comparator: phase sequence replication fidelity analysis and deviations
component_order: phase sequence and replication must be explicit
instrument_protocol: SCRIBE 2016 26-item reporting guideline
uncertainty: complete reporting does not ensure causal validity or adequate evidence
individual_response: Provides a level-4 experiment metadata contract only; checklist completion cannot promote a claim or establish safety
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; behavioral rather than athlete-monitoring validation; no universal n time span or freshness threshold

event: SCED design and visual evidence standards
intervention: systematic manipulation with repeated demonstrations
comparator: visual evidence across level trend variability immediacy overlap and consistency
component_order: design-specific phase sequence and repeated demonstrations
outcome_measure: LEVEL; TREND; VARIABILITY; IMMEDIACY; OVERLAP; CONSISTENCY
instrument_protocol: WWC Single-Case Design Technical Documentation Version 1.0 Pilot
uncertainty: point counts operate only with manipulation replication measurement and design requirements
individual_response: The 3 or 5 point standards are formal design-review rules only; they must not become universal DESCRIPTIVE_BASELINE n freshness or athlete causal thresholds
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; education evidence standard and not a law of athlete time series; no universal duration or freshness threshold

intervention: fixed response-guided and random baseline-length rules
comparator: analysis error and power under varying trend and variability
instrument_protocol: conservative dual-criteria and machine-learning analyses under specified simulations
uncertainty: simulation target error and power depend on joint baseline and analysis choices
individual_response: Opposes rigid wait-until-stable rules but does not allow trend to be ignored; baseline sufficiency remains design-specific across DESCRIPTIVE_BASELINE and level 4
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; replication with other designs and time-varying graph parameters needed; no universal short baseline n or freshness threshold

event: serially correlated level and rate contrasts
intervention: paired and two-sample serial t-tests
comparator: serial tests versus ordinary independent t-tests
instrument_protocol: specified serial-correlation structure and intended level or rate contrast
uncertainty: serial-model assumptions require checking and very few observations remain unsafe
individual_response: PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON requires serially valid or randomization-based inference; unsupported serial structure forces descriptive output
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; no universal minimum observations time span or freshness threshold reported

event: SCED design measurement baseline and analysis practices
intervention: systematic methodological review of published SCEDs
comparator: published practice versus contemporary design standards
instrument_protocol: study-specific SCED protocols
uncertainty: analytic disagreement and limited reproducibility of visual analysis remain
individual_response: Design measurement replication trend and analysis are separate gates; SCED quality cannot be reduced to a count or automatically promote level 4
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; behavioral-health directness is limited for athletes; no universal athlete n duration or freshness threshold

event: randomized ABAB alternating-treatment multiple-baseline and changing-criterion designs
intervention: randomized single-case designs
comparator: randomized start or order versus nonrandom historical separation
component_order: randomize intervention start or order where feasible
instrument_protocol: analyze the actual randomization scheme and match design to reversibility
uncertainty: poor measurement carryover confounding and irreversibility remain after randomization
individual_response: Prospective randomization or counterbalancing strengthens PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON; nonrandom historical splits require weaker wording and confounding flags
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; healthcare transfer is indirect; no universal n time span or freshness threshold

population: athletes across individual and team sports
intervention: mixed internal external subjective and objective monitoring
comparator: individual longitudinal and contextual interpretation across marker streams
outcome_measure: PERCEPTION; HEART_RATE; BIOCHEMICAL; NEUROMUSCULAR; QUESTIONNAIRE; DIARY; PSYCHOMOTOR; SLEEP
instrument_protocol: marker-specific methods with individual context
uncertainty: few markers have strong support and no single definitive fatigue marker exists
individual_response: Streams may support bounded OBSERVATION or DESCRIPTIVE_BASELINE; discordance remains visible and cannot become readiness diagnosis safety or clearance
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; narrative mixed-sport evidence; no universal n time span freshness or dominant marker rule

event: subjective and objective wellbeing response to training load
intervention: concurrent subjective and objective athlete monitoring
comparator: agreement and responsiveness across subjective and objective streams
instrument_protocol: standardized timing and named instrument or protocol
uncertainty: frequent disagreement and review heterogeneity prevent universal thresholds
individual_response: Subjective and objective streams remain separate with provenance; disagreement cannot be fused into a causal readiness safety or automatic plan signal
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; observational responsiveness is not causal or safety proof; no universal n time span or freshness threshold

intervention: AB reversal multiple-baseline and alternating-treatment designs
comparator: design matched to intervention with serial dependency and multivariate context
instrument_protocol: athlete-specific repeated-measure design
uncertainty: applied sport constraints can weaken manipulation replication and causal separation
individual_response: Supports a sport-specific PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON lane only when serial-dependence and design-quality gates pass; no automatic promotion
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; methodological advocacy not a validated universal procedure; no n time span or freshness threshold

intervention: Practical guide to single-case experimental designs
comparator: Phase sequencing, randomization, fidelity, replication and carryover-aware alternatives
component_order: Phase sequence or multiple baseline; reversal requires reversible effects
outcome_measure: Repeated measures; procedural fidelity; phase decisions; replication
instrument_protocol: Methods guide; current Formation pilot is NOT_A_SCED and tests only whether stable repeated measurement is feasible
time_points: Repeated measures across prespecified phases in a future SCED
effect_estimate: Method guidance; no empirical pilot effect estimate
uncertainty: Publisher full text not re-opened in bounded recovery
individual_response: NOT_APPLICABLE
limitations: Not youth sport; cumulative training makes ABAB reversal unsuitable; no causal, efficacy or safety claim

intervention: SCRIBE 2016 single-case reporting guideline
comparator: Single-case reports with heterogeneous designs
component_dose: 26 reporting items covering decisions, randomization, consent, measurement, fidelity, analysis, stop reasons, raw data, adverse events and limitations
outcome_measure: Completion; stop reason; process event; procedural fidelity; adverse events; limitations
instrument_protocol: Delphi/consensus reporting guideline; current pilot borrows process fields without becoming a SCED
time_points: Repeated observations and phase events in a future SCED
missingness: Missing raw data and stop reasons must be explicit
adverse_events: Adverse events are reporting fields, not evidence that current pilot establishes safety
effect_estimate: Reporting guidance; no causal effect estimate
uncertainty: Multiple journal versions; identifiers refer to linked PMC version
individual_response: NOT_APPLICABLE
limitations: Not a conduct standard or causal validation; later SCED requires stable version, carryover/trend/autocorrelation analysis and replication

population: N-of-1 clinical methods; no athlete population
intervention: CENT 2015 explanation and elaboration for prospectively planned N-of-1 trials
comparator: Incomplete or retrospectively reconstructed period-level reporting
component_dose: Pre-specify interventions outcomes periods sequence stopping rules and analysis; exact dose is design-specific
component_order: Pre-specified randomized or otherwise justified period sequence
separation_hours: Design-specific washout or separation must address carryover
actual_interval_hours: Design-specific period duration; no universal interval
outcome_measure: Period-level intervention delivery outcomes harms withdrawals protocol deviations and missing data
instrument_protocol: CENT 2015 explanation and elaboration; companion reporting guidance
missingness: Report period-level missingness attrition and protocol deviations
adverse_events: Report harms for each intervention period
uncertainty: Carryover irreversibility period effects and measurement error remain design constraints
individual_response: NOT_APPLICABLE
limitations: Reporting guidance does not validate ABAB or crossover for cumulative training adaptation and supplies no universal baseline count freshness threshold efficacy safety or 9.5-day scientific superiority

population: sports medicine and sport science populations
intervention: repeated trials under the same protocol
comparator: within-subject test-retest variation
instrument_protocol: compatible repeated-trial metric and protocol
uncertainty: reliability estimates require their own uncertainty and adequate study design
individual_response: Metric-specific typical error may support MEASUREMENT_ERROR_EXCEEDING_CHANGE; published study-level guidance cannot become an athlete-level n gate
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; approximate participant or trial guidance was not verified for extraction; no universal baseline count or freshness threshold

population: individual patients in prospective N-of-1 trials
intervention: prospectively planned multiple-crossover N-of-1 trial
comparator: pre-specified interventions outcomes sequence periods stopping and analysis
instrument_protocol: CENT 2015 reporting checklist; official erratum linked
missingness: report complete period-level missingness and deviations
uncertainty: reporting completeness does not establish power validity safety or sport transfer
individual_response: Provides metadata requirements for PROSPECTIVE_HYPOTHESIS_COMPARISON only; it does not grant claim promotion or safety authority
limitations: ABSTRACT_AND_OFFICIAL_RECORD_USED; erratum PMID 27758798 applies; no universal period count duration or freshness threshold

intervention: two-round Delphi taxonomy and checklist development
comparator: expert consensus across intended population purpose and setting
instrument_protocol: intended-use and population-specific appraisal taxonomy
uncertainty: expert agreement is not validation of a particular metric
individual_response: Supports registry metadata and intended-use checks only; it does not by itself promote any athlete claim-ladder level
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; consensus provides no athlete-specific observation count time span freshness threshold or causal validity

population: four NCAA Division I basketball athletes
intervention: repeated CMJ testing and individual gain classification
comparator: model statistic versus SWC CV and SEM
instrument_protocol: consistent countermovement-jump protocol; full protocol NOT_VERIFIED_FROM_ABSTRACT
uncertainty: randomness and worthwhile magnitude require separate treatment
individual_response: Illustrates an error-aware individual report but five sessions biweekly cadence and CV preference cannot become universal DESCRIPTIVE_BASELINE or level-3 defaults
limitations: ABSTRACT_ONLY; four basketball athletes and narrow CMJ example; no transfer to youth middle-distance metrics safety or universal freshness

event: weekly reactive-strength testing with 5-7-week baseline and 6-week resistance-plyometric intervention
intervention: nonconcurrent multiple-baseline SCED with resistance-plyometric intervention
comparator: individual baseline versus intervention trajectories and combined interpretation
instrument_protocol: weekly reactive-strength test protocol; exact device and error model NOT_EXTRACTED
uncertainty: history concurrent training serial dependence and nonconcurrent baselines remain possible explanations
individual_response: Demonstrates feasible prospective sport SCED and distinct individual paths; its schedule is an application detail and does not set universal n freshness efficacy or safety
limitations: FULL_TEXT_VERIFIED; four cases one outcome family and combined intervention; direct youth middle-distance transfer and causal isolation remain limited

intervention: Cochrane guidance for summary-of-findings tables and certainty assessment
comparator: Unstructured certainty language without explicit domains or outcome-specific judgments
component_dose: Outcome-specific certainty appraisal across risk of bias inconsistency indirectness imprecision publication bias and applicable upgrading considerations
outcome_measure: Outcome-specific certainty and reasons for rating decisions
instrument_protocol: Cochrane Handbook chapter 14 and GRADE framework
missingness: Unavailable studies inaccessible full text and missing outcome data must remain visible in certainty judgments
adverse_events: Adverse outcomes require their own outcome-specific appraisal when reported
uncertainty: Certainty may differ by outcome; imprecision inconsistency indirectness and bias require explicit judgment
individual_response: NOT_APPLICABLE
limitations: Generic review guidance does not supply athlete-specific transfer efficacy safety minimum n freshness thresholds or automated-prescription authority; adolescent 800 and 1500 m population and 9.5-day intervention directness must be judged separately
